channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Seattle Storm used to be the 'tail' on the 'dog' of its NBA counterpart. Now the WNBA team is leading the city's basketball revival
item.description: 'It's the Sonics and the Storm; it's the Storm and the Sonics,' team co-owner Ginny Gilder said. 'It's bread and butter, apple pie and vanilla ice cream.'

item.title: Why oil's not at $200 after the biggest supply shock in history
item.description: Global inventories are declining at a record pace, leaving the market increasingly vulnerable to fresh disruptions.

item.title: Ukraine targets St. Petersburg after Putin refuses talks
item.description: Russia continued its own attacks on Ukraine, with at least 12 civilians killed and over 70 injured across the nation in the past day, according to regional reports.

item.title: This may be the maximum sustainable level of U.S. debt before interest payments trigger a default crisis that even steep tax hikes cannot fix
item.description: Bond markets unravel sooner when investors believe the government will not restore fiscal sustainability.
